facts.text: SvelteKit route pages use .svelte files and native Svelte syntax; React and Next.js components are not interchangeable with Svelte route components.

avoid.action: add React or Next.js component patterns to a SvelteKit route page
avoid.reason: SvelteKit fixtures expect native Svelte component syntax.

next_hints.reason: Read the existing Svelte page before editing route UI.
